# Filippo Teodoro

> Personal website of Filippo Teodoro — strategy professional, builder, and curious person based in Milan.

## About

Filippo Teodoro is a Strategy Manager at Sky (CEO/CTO office) in Milan, Italy. He previously worked in consulting at McKinsey & Company and Bain & Company (private equity focus), at Amazon, a machine learning hedge fund in London, and several startups.

He grew up in Viterbo, near Rome, and studied in Buenos Aires, Barcelona, Singapore, and Paris.

On the side, he builds things online. His interests include cultures, nature, sports, health, tech, finance, design, geopolitics, startups, music, and fashion.
